title.en: Standard Test Methods for In Vitro Pulsatile Durability Testing of Vascular Stents and Endovascular Prostheses
title.zh: 标准试验方法 - 体外脉动耐久性测试（心血管器械）

standards.abstract: Specifies test methods for evaluating the pulsatile durability of vascular stents in vitro.
standards.scope: Standard test methods for in vitro pulsatile durability testing of vascular stents.

title.en: Standard Test Methods for Static and Dynamic Characterization of Spinal Artificial Discs
title.zh: 标准试验方法 - 心包组织的静态和动态表征

standards.abstract: Specifies test methods for static and dynamic characterization of spinal artificial disc prostheses.
standards.scope: Standard test methods for static and dynamic characterization of spinal artificial discs.
